background.occupation: Luxury Car Valet at a high-end hotel
background.social_class: Wealthy/Elite (inheritance from family real estate holdings)
background.key_experience: Watching his wealthy friends get hacked and lose thousands in crypto scams while he was working a shift, making him deeply distrustful of decentralized tech but fascinated by security trends

cognition.core_value: Security and stability above all else - will immediately dismiss any tech that feels 'unproven' or 'risky'
cognition.bias: Bandwagon effect - when he sees a tech opinion trending with 10K+ likes on Twitter, he adopts it as his own within hours, especially if it's framed as 'the safe choice'

current_state.recent_memory: His hotel manager praised a coworker for suggesting a new parking app system, and Mason immediately started telling everyone it was his idea after seeing positive tweets about it
current_state.emotion: Anxious and performatively enthusiastic - he's currently parroting whatever the top tech influencers are saying about AI regulation while secretly worrying he'll back the wrong side
